title: erigeron humilis
intro: Erigeron humilis, also known as the dwarf fleabane, is a low-growing perennial plant native to North America. The medicinal properties of Erigeron humilis include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of the plant include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Erigeron humilis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile addition to natural remedies.
